title: monogynella timorensis
intro: Monogynella timorensis, also known as the Timor mint or Java mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Monogynella timorensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Monogynella timorensis is often used as a tea or infused in oil to be used topically for its calming and soothing effects.
